ValidationRule.description: Prevents users from editing key forecast fields once the record has been submitted for approval. Allowed only when status is Draft.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Is_Monthly_Forecast__c, NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Approval_Status__c), "Draft")), OR( ISCHANGED(Forecast_Quantity__c), ISCHANGED(Forecast_UOM__c), ISCHANGED(Distributor__c), ISCHANGED(Product__c), ISCHANGED(Product_Sub_Group__c), ISCHANGED(Forecast_Month__c), ISCHANGED(Forecast_Year__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This forecast has already been submitted and cannot be edited.
